archetypes.name: Find Extremum with Constraint
question_templates: What is the greatest multiple of {n} less than {limit}?
What is the smallest prime greater than {n}?
What is the largest factor of {n} that is less than {limit}?
distractor_strategies: Include nearby values that don't satisfy constraint
Include values that satisfy different constraint

archetypes.name: Identify Number with Property
question_templates: Which of the following is prime?
Which of the following is NOT divisible by 3?
Which is a perfect square?
distractor_strategies: Include numbers that almost satisfy property
Mix numbers with similar digit patterns

archetypes.name: Ordering and Ranking
question_templates: Arrange from largest to smallest. Which is in the middle?
Order from least to greatest. Which is third?
Which is closest to {target}?

archetypes.name: Consecutive Integer Problems
question_templates: Three consecutive integers sum to {sum}. What is the middle integer?
The product of two consecutive integers is {product}. What is the smaller?
Four consecutive even integers sum to {sum}. What is the largest?

archetypes.name: Percent Change Problems
question_templates: A price of ${price} is reduced by {percent}%. What is the new price?
After a {percent}% increase, the value is {final}. What was the original?
By what percent did {initial} change to {final}?
distractor_strategies: Include result of using wrong base
Include simple percent calculation without context

archetypes.name: Factor Counting
question_templates: How many positive factors does {n} have?
How many even factors does {n} have?
How many factors of {n} are less than {limit}?
distractor_strategies: Miss one factor (often 1 or n itself)

archetypes.name: Prime Factorization Application
question_templates: What is the sum of the prime factors of {n}?
What is the largest prime factor of {n}?
Express {n} as a product of primes. How many prime factors?

archetypes.name: Pattern Continuation
question_templates: What is the next term in: {sequence}?
What is the 10th term in: {sequence}?
In the pattern {sequence}, what is the {n}th term?

archetypes.name: Operation Result
question_templates: What is the sum of {a} and {b}?
What is {a} divided by {b}?
Calculate: {expression}
distractor_strategies: Include results of wrong operation order

archetypes.name: Word Problem Translation
question_templates: Sarah has {n} apples. She gives away {m}. How many does she have?
A train travels at {speed} km/h for {time} hours. How far?
If {n} items cost ${total}, how much do {m} items cost?

archetypes.name: Area and Perimeter Calculation
question_templates: What is the area of a rectangle with length {l} and width {w}?
What is the perimeter of a square with side {s}?
A rectangle has area {area}. If the length is {l}, what is the width?

archetypes.name: Counting Arrangements
question_templates: How many 3-digit numbers can be formed using {digits}?
In how many ways can {n} people line up?
How many ways to choose {k} items from {n}?
distractor_strategies: Include count with repetition when not allowed

archetypes.name: Working Backwards
archetypes.pattern: After [operations], result is [value]. What was original?
question_templates: After doubling and adding 5, the result is {result}. What was the original?
A number is tripled, then 10 is subtracted. The result is {result}. Find the number.
When {n} is added to a number and the sum is halved, the result is {result}.
distractor_strategies: Include result of wrong operation reversal
